milestoneTitle: Phase M9.17a.4 — Simplified constraint recipe for learn-item rows. Stopped stacking constraints (min-width:0 + overflow:hidden + padding-right:44px + :has() gates) and removed the underlying cause: the ⋯ menu was absolute-positioned OVER the card, which required all those padding and clipping hacks to keep the title from running under it. New recipe: .learn-item-wrap becomes a flex row, .learn-item is flex:1 (fills remaining width after menu), .learn-menu is a natural flex sibling at the right with margin 4px 6px 0 0 (preserves the previous visual inset). Title's own overflow:hidden + text-overflow:ellipsis handles truncation — no helpers needed. Cache-buster query bumped to dev.31 per the new memory protocol.
